variants.title: Fleetguard HF6118 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P166376
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF6118 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P166376
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF6118 premium hydraulic cartridge filter is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
specifications: Style: Transmission Cartridge, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 14µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 109.2 mm, Inner Diameter: 35.6 mm, Length: 226.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 13 bar, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 14µ @ β1000, Media Type: Synthetic, Collapse Pressure: 13.8 BAR

variants.title: Mann Filter H 11 005 x Hydraulics | Replaces the Donaldson P166376
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter H 11 005 x Hydraulics | Replaces the Donaldson P166376
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 110.0 mm, Dimension B: 37.0 mm, Dimension C: 37.0 mm, Dimension H: 225.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 14µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 109.2 mm, Inner Diameter: 35.6 mm, Length: 226.0 mm, Media Type: Synthetic, Collapse Pressure: 13.8 BAR

variants.title: Donaldson P166376 Transmission Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P166376 Transmission Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Transmission Cartridge, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 14µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 109.2 mm, Inner Diameter: 35.6 mm, Length: 226.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 13 bar, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 14µ @ β1000, Media Type: Synthetic, Collapse Pressure: 13.8 BAR
